dict.string: You can use your device’s camera to search, scan your credit card or gift card, attach a picture to a review, or view a product model in augmented reality.
Amazon uses your location for shopping experience improvements, including local offers like Treasure Truck.
We would like to use Bluetooth to set up your Amazon Dash devices.
Amazon would like to schedule events on your calendar
Amazon requires access to the microphone so you can use your voice to search for products, track your orders, reorder items, and more.
Amazon uses your location for shopping experience improvements, including faster address selection and local Amazon shopping services.
Earn Amazon credit by inviting friends. To show your list of friends to invite, Amazon needs to load your contact list.
You can use photos on your device to search for products or attach a picture to a review.
